content.en:
"Copy!"

Ye Tian began to copy the Space-Time Pole Dao Monument.

In an instant, a little bit of the breath of the Space-Time Pole Dao Monument diffused out, and began to condense to form a phantom of the Space-Time Pole Dao Monument, which slowly became condensed.

"I can copy it!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

However, the speed of replication is very slow, obviously because the grade of the space-time pole Dao Monument is too high, so it is not easy to copy.

Moreover, when copying the Space-Time Extreme Dao Monument, the power on Ye Tian's body was consumed very quickly, and if he wanted to maintain this process of replication, he had to prepare a lot of resources, and it would take a long time.

Otherwise, it can't be replicated at all.

"I thought I could replicate it in an instant, but I thought too much. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to consume a lot of resources, just to successfully copy the Space-Time Pole Dao Monument.

Time passed, a large amount of resources were consumed, and some of them were Extreme Dao resources, because Ye Tian's own Extreme Dao Origin Power was also rapidly depleting, and if he didn't replenish it, it would affect his own foundation.

He didn't want to give up, so he had to spend the price to copy the Space-Time Pole Dao Monument.

"As long as the copy is successful, it will make a lot of money, and this resource is nothing!"

Ye Tian said.

Thirty million eternal years had passed, and Ye Tiancai had finally copied the complete Space-Time Extreme Dao Monument.

Rumble!!!!

The complete space-time Extreme Dao Monument stood in the Terran territory of the Origin Realm Sea, and the incomparably mysterious Extreme Dao aura emanated, even if those Terran people could not comprehend the Extreme Dao, but in such a link, the cultivation speed must be very fast.

Ye Tian blocked the space-time pole path layer by layer, and did not dare to leak it out, otherwise something big would happen.

In the future, even if the human race wants to comprehend the Extreme Dao Monument of Time and Space, at least it must be a half-step perfect controller, otherwise it will not be qualified to come to the Enlightenment.

"The space-time Polar Dao Monument in the Extreme Dao Demon Ape Graveyard is exactly the same, and the new ability to copy the talent is indeed too terrifying to copy everything, and even the Space-Time Extreme Dao Monument can be copied. "

Ye Tian said in surprise.

Of course, once the space-time pole dao monument is lifted, it will be gone, so ye tian will not lift the space-time pole dao monument for a long time, even if he can't copy other treasures, it's worth it.

Moreover, he didn't need to refine the space-time Extreme Dao Monument, he just used the Space-Time Extreme Dao Monument to comprehend, so the Space-Time Extreme Dao Monument would not disappear, if he copied the resource of the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit, it would be useless.

Only the auxiliary treasure of the Space-Time Pole Dao Monument can truly exert its ability to copy all things.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian sat on the space-time pole monument and began to comprehend the space-time pole path.

With this contemplation, countless mysteries about the Extreme Dao of Space emerged, and the speed of comprehension far exceeded that of before.

"Such a terrifying comprehension effect, no wonder even those Extreme Dao creatures who are perfect controllers of the True Realm are desperately trying to snatch the Extreme Dao Monument of Time and Space!" Ye Tian muttered.

With such a space-time extreme dao monument, he could definitely cultivate the spatial extreme dao to the small success realm, or even the great success realm, in a short period of time.

Meanwhile.

Ye Tian was also using those Extreme Dao Golden Flowers and similar Extreme Dao treasures to impact the Extreme Dao chains, striving to break more Extreme Dao chains.

In this way, Ye Tian's duplicate bodies were working hard to cultivate.

After millions of eternal years, Ye Tian actually cultivated the Spatial Extreme Dao to the Xiaocheng realm, and this cultivation speed was too fast.

Subsequently, Ye Tian began to comprehend the Time Pole Dao, he had the Time Pole Dao Ancestral Endowment, coupled with the Time and Space Pole Dao Monument, his speed in the Time Pole Dao reached an incredible level.

As a result, he comprehended the Temporal Pole many times faster than the Spatial Pole.

If he wants to comprehend the Spatial Extreme Dao to the Dacheng realm, he will need at least hundreds of millions of eternal years or even more time, but if he wants to comprehend the Extreme Dao of Time, I am afraid that he only needs tens of millions of eternal years to comprehend the Extreme Dao of Time to the Dacheng realm.

Basically, no one wants to cultivate an Extreme Dao to the Dacheng Realm among the super-perfect masters, because it is too much of a waste of time, and it is not of much help to the Perfect Masters of the Impregnated Realm, after all, the small achievements of the Extreme Dao meet the conditions, and cultivating to the Great Perfection Extreme Dao is completely redundant.

But Ye Tian cultivated the Time Extreme Dao to the Dacheng realm, it didn't take long at all, and in the absence of other opportunities, it took more time to cultivate other Extreme Dao to Xiaocheng than time to cultivate to the Dacheng realm.

Therefore, he naturally has to give priority to the Enlightenment of the Extreme Dao of Time.

Once he comprehends the Extreme Dao of Time to the Dacheng realm, his strength will also be greatly improved, so spending tens of millions of more eternal years can make his strength skyrocket, and he is naturally willing to spend this time.

In the following years, Ye Tian worked hard to comprehend the Extreme Dao of Time.

I have to say that the time pole Dao ancestor Fu cooperates with the time and space pole dao monument, and the effect is too good!

Time flies, and more than 30 million eternal years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's Time Extreme Dao finally broke the shackles and reached the realm of Dacheng.

The space-time pole of the Dacheng realm far surpasses the space-time pole of the Xiaocheng realm, and if it is combined with the time-based pole control technique, the effect is extremely terrifying.

At this moment, Ye Tian's strength skyrocketed.

At the same time, Ye Tian used those Extreme Dao Golden Flowers to break several Extreme Dao chains.

Now, he had broken the eight Extreme Chains, which was an incomparably exaggerated amount for other super-perfect controllers to be able to break the Eight Extreme Chains.

In addition, Ye Tian also consumed a lot of resources and extreme treasures, and continuously advanced his cultivation to the extreme of a super-perfect controller.

Whether it is the Endless Extreme Dao Perfect Ancestor, or the power of the Extreme Dao, or the will of the Extreme Dao, it is greatly improved, although the strength of this enhancement is not much, but it must be improved, otherwise there will be no way to impact the Perfect Controller of the Void Realm in the future.

At this cultivation speed, it wouldn't take too long for Ye Tian to attack the Perfect Controller of the Void Realm.

In the following years, Ye Tian's Void Soul Sparrow copied his body and continued to condense Extreme Dao Coins and buy more Extreme Dao Golden Fruits in the Xuandao Trading Area.

Anyway, 100 million eternal years are opened once, which is not too long.

With enough Extreme Dao Coins, Ye Tian didn't care about buying things at all.

With sufficient resources, Ye Tian's cultivation strength naturally improved quickly.

Before you know it, more than 900 million eternal years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already broken the thirteen extreme chains.

Not only that, Ye Tian also cultivated the Spatial Extreme Dao to the Dacheng realm, and he also cultivated the Defense Extreme Dao to the Dacheng realm.

In fact, most of them were cultivating the Defensive Pole Path.

He was able to cultivate the Defensive Extreme Dao to the Dacheng Realm entirely because of the existence of the Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu of the Netherworld, which was conducive to contemplating the Defensive Extreme Dao.

Otherwise, Ye Tian would not be able to cultivate the Defensive Extreme Dao to the Dacheng realm at all.

I have to say that there is no treasure like the Extreme Dao Monument of Time and Space, and it is indeed too slow to comprehend the Extreme Dao.

If you want to comprehend the extreme path of fire and ice, if you want to cultivate to the Xiaocheng realm, you need one billion eternal years, and if you want to cultivate to the Dacheng realm, you can't do it without tens of billions or even hundreds of billions of eternal years.

"It would be nice if we could find more treasures like the Space-Time Pole Dao Monument!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Even if he can't find it, let him find some more Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu, that's fine!

this day.

Another piece of good news.

That is, the super-perfect piece of the Nine Rivers Void has not only completely become an extreme treasure, but is also about to be completely conceived.

Immediately, Ye Tian sealed off this area to prevent the vision from attracting the powerful creatures in the end of the realm.
